title: Rich Roasted American Cornbread Casserole
description: A crumbly, umami cornbread casserole featuring mustard seeds, perfect for special occasions. This recipe serves 8-10 people.

ingredients.name: 2 cups cornbread mix
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality mix for the best results

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Don't skip this for a lighter version

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons Dijon mustard
ingredients.notes: Don't skip this for the best flavor

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: Add a warm, earthy flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon mustard seeds
ingredients.notes: Add a nutty flavor to the dish

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the cornbread mix, grated cheese, heavy cream, onion, garlic, corn kernels, Dijon mustard, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter and eggs.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and return the dish to the oven.
Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
